visualization.description: Customer order frequency distribution segmented by customer category

effect.description: Filters subsequent views to selected customer segments

encodings: y:Number of orders (quantitative, aggregated by count)
visualization.description: Product category frequency analysis highlighted by selected customer segments

effect.description: Shows detailed product count tooltip per category

visualization.description: Co-occurrence matrix showing product pairs frequently bought together

effect.description: Drills down to customer purchase sequences for selected product pair

outputs.path: The user first examines customer order frequency segments in View 1 (Overview). They select Premium customers to filter View 2 (Exploration) showing category preferences. In View 3 (Detail), they analyze specific product co-occurrences within selected categories, revealing cross-selling opportunities.
